title: Power Dialer
description: Multi-line parallel dialing that dramatically increases your contact rate and call volume. Reach more leads in less time — one rep does the work of five.

title: Local Presence
description: Automatically dial from local numbers so prospects see a familiar area code. Higher answer rates mean more conversations and more sales.

title: Spam Shield
description: Protect your caller ID reputation with automatic number rotation and health monitoring. Keep your numbers clean so your calls get answered.

title: Call Transfer
description: Warm and cold transfers that keep the conversation flowing. Hand off to closers, managers, or specialists without dropping the prospect.

title: AI CRM
description: A CRM that manages itself. Talk to your CRM, tell it what to do — it logs calls, updates records, and keeps your pipeline clean without manual data entry.

title: On-Call Coaching
description: AI whispers help you while you're live on a call — increasing talk time and closing rate. Upload your scripts for whisper training and script mode.

title: Smart Queue
description: AI creates and manages your call queue automatically. Old leads that didn't answer get recycled back into rotation so nothing falls through the cracks.

title: Post-Sale Sequences
description: Automated follow-up that calls back one week after a sale, emails at one month and three months. Keeps customers engaged and reduces chargebacks.

title: Pipeline Nourishment
description: Re-engagement queues that automatically work cold leads back into your pipeline. Dripped leads from old campaigns get a second life instead of dying in a spreadsheet.

title: Lead Disbursement
description: Management disperses 1,000 leads between five reps and each person gets exactly their leads. No more sharing CRM access or fighting over who called who.

title: Chat SDK
description: Connected to Discord, Slack, and Teams — extends Consuelo's functionality directly into the platforms your team already uses. Collaboration is no longer an issue.

title: Analytics
description: Post-call analytics that actually get done. See what makes better calls, longer calls, and more sales — then use that data to build a better team.

title: Ads to CRM
description: Connect your ads platform straight to your CRM. Leads from campaigns flow directly into your pipeline — no CSV exports, no manual imports, no resold leads.

title: GHL Embedded
description: Works inside GoHighLevel as a native embedded app. Your team dials, coaches, and manages leads without ever leaving the GHL dashboard.

title: Google Extension
description: Works right in your browser. Click-to-dial from any webpage, log calls automatically, and access your dialer wherever you're already working.
